response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer but lacks the core requirements for this role. No professional C++ experience on Windows in the last decade (only a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not align with a C++ capital markets consulting engagement.
strengths: Senior engineering experience at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify)
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing culture
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience (only ~6 months, 10+ years ago)
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform background
